title: UK Government GitHub Organisation Mapping
description: Maps GitHub organisations to UK central and local government organisations.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date the file was last updated

central_government.description: Central government organisations, identified by GOV.UK organisation slug.

govuk_slug.description: GOV.UK organisation slug. Use with the GOV.UK Organisations API: GET https://www.gov.uk/api/organisations/{govuk_slug}

wikidata_id.description: Wikidata entity ID. Use with the Wikidata API: https://www.wikidata.org/entity/{wikidata_id}

github_orgs.description: GitHub organisation names belonging to this government organisation. Match against the 'owner' field in the UK X-Gov Open Source Repo Scraper dataset.

local_government.description: Local government organisations. English councils include an england_planning_data_reference; all entries include a wikidata_id.

england_planning_data_reference.description: Local authority reference code from planning.data.gov.uk. Present for English councils only. Use with the planning data API: GET https://www.planning.data.gov.uk/entity.json?dataset=local-authority&reference={england_planning_data_reference}

wikidata_id.description: Wikidata entity ID. Present for all entries. Use with the Wikidata API: https://www.wikidata.org/entity/{wikidata_id}

github_orgs.description: GitHub organisation names belonging to this local authority. Match against the 'owner' field in the UK X-Gov Open Source Repo Scraper dataset.
